Title: DUMOS Arched Full Length Mirror with Stand Floor Standing Aluminum Frame for Bedroom Body Hanging Leaning Modern Simple Home Decor Shatter-Proorf Nano Glass Wall Living Room Cloakroom Black 56"x15"
About_Item: 【Oversized Full-Length Mirror】This full body mirror delivers a clear head-to-toe reflection with distortion-free glass. It’s a practical must-have and stylish decor upgrade for your bedroom, living room, closet, home gym and more

【Shatterproof & Long-Lasting Quality】Built with nano tempered glass and a solid aluminum alloy frame, this floor mirror is stronger and safer than ordinary glass. It’s shatter-resistant, fade-proof, and durable, ensuring years of crystal-clear reflection without worry.

【Three Placement Options】Enjoy maximum flexibility—stand it upright on the floor, lean it casually against the wall, or mount it securely to save space. A complete screw kit is included, making it easy to adapt the mirror to your room and lifestyle.

【Ready to Use, No Assembly Needed】Skip complicated setups—this bedroom floor mirror arrives fully assembled and ready to use. Its lightweight yet sturdy frame allows you to move it effortlessly, giving you the freedom to refresh your room layout whenever you like.

【Modern Design, Space-Saving Style】With its slim profile and minimalist frame, this mirror blends seamlessly into any décor. It adds both function and elegance to your space, making it an eye-catching accent while maximizing room efficiency.

Title: Echo Dot (3rd Gen, 2018 release) - Smart speaker with Alexa - Charcoal
About_Item: MEET ECHO DOT - Our most compact smart speaker that fits perfectly into small spaces.
RICH AND LOUD SOUND - Better speaker quality than Echo Dot Gen 2 for richer and louder sound. Pair with a second Echo Dot for stereo sound.
ALEXA HELPS YOU DO MORE WITH PRIME - Listen to millions of songs with Amazon Music, use your voice to for 2-day shipping, listen to audiobooks on Audible, and much more.
MAKE YOUR LIFE EASIER - Alexa can set timers, check the weather, read the news, adjust thermostats, answer questions, and more to help with daily tasks.
DESIGNED TO PROTECT YOUR PRIVACY – Built with multiple layers of privacy controls including the ability to delete your recordings, mute your mic, and more in-app privacy controls.

CONTROL MUSIC WITH A SIMPLE PHRASE - Echo Dot allows you to stream songs from Amazon Music, Apple Music, Spotify, SiriusXM, and others, as well as via Bluetooth. Voice control with Alexa makes it easy to skip to the next song, adjust the volume, and pause without getting up.
CONNECT WITH OTHERS HANDS-FREE - Call friends and family who have the Alexa app or an Echo device. Instantly drop in on other rooms or announce to the whole house that dinner's ready.
ALEXA HAS SKILLS - With tens of thousands of skills and counting, Alexa is always getting smarter and adding new skills like tracking fitness, playing games, and more.
